videos.headline: Jack Harlow storms the field as Louisville upsets Notre Dame
videos.description: Jack Harlow, Louisville fans storms the field as Cardinals complete upset of Notre Dame.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jack Harlow storms the field as Louisville upsets Notre Dame) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Jack Plummer avoids the pressure for a Louisville TD
videos.description: Jack Plummer steps up and delivers a strike to Jabari Thrash to get Louisville on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jack Plummer avoids the pressure for a Louisville TD) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Louisville's Quincy Riley leaps to pick off Sam Hartman
videos.description: Quincy Riley makes a leaping grab for Sam Hartman's first interception of the season.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Louisville's Quincy Riley leaps to pick off Sam Hartman) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Sam Hartman hits Jordan Faison for a Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Sam Hartman airs it out to Jordan Faison for a 36-yard Notre Dame TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Sam Hartman hits Jordan Faison for a Notre Dame TD) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Notre Dame's trick play results in a fumble and turnover
videos.description: Notre Dame attempts a fake handoff but turns the ball over in the process.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Notre Dame's trick play results in a fumble and turnover) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Jawhar Jordan rips off a 45-yard touchdown run for Louisville
videos.description: Jawhar Jordan gets the home crowd on their feet with a 45-yard touchdown run to take the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jawhar Jordan rips off a 45-yard touchdown run for Louisville) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Jack Harlow gets fired up over Jawhar Jordan's TD
videos.description: Jack Harlow gets fired up over a Jawhar Jordan rushing touchdown to extend Louisville's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jack Harlow gets fired up over Jawhar Jordan's TD) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Louisville picks off Sam Hartman for the second time in the game
videos.description: Devin Neal comes down with Sam Hartman's second interception of the game.
